properties.remark: EF0 TORNADO TOUCHED DOWN AT A CAR DEALERSHIP ON WASHINGTON ST. THREE RV TRAILERS WEIGHING 5000 POUNDS EACH WERE PUSHED BACK 6 FT AGAINST A FENCE. ONE TRAILER WAS LIFTED ABOUT 15 FT BUT LANDED ON ITS WHEELS WITH MINIMAL DAMAGE. AN ALUMINUM GARAGE DOOR WAS BLOWN OUT. TORNADO WAS CAPTURED BY A SECURITY CAMERA AND RECORDED ON CELL PHONE CAMERAS BY SEVERAL EYEWITNESSES. ESTIMATED MAXIMUM WINDS 85 MPH. PATH LENGTH 0.25 MILES. MAXIMUM PATH WIDTH 50 YARDS.
ON WASHINGTON STREET...WINDOWS SMASHED ON SMALL VEHICLE...PUSHED AGAINST MAILBOX. PARTIALLY CLOSED GARAGE DOOR WAS DESTROYED.
TWO LARGE PINE TREES DOWNED...ONE ON DEAN RD AND ANOTHER ON ERICA DR.
NEAR BUCKLAND MALL...LASTED 10 MINS
